pi_items.source: Verified via setup_task.sh which prepares the /home/ga/DICOM/exports directory and export_result.sh which explicitly reads the final report from /home/ga/DICOM/exports/mismatch_report.txt.
Verified via Python logic in setup_task.sh which writes the corrupted filename and new Patient ID to /var/lib/app/ground_truth/qa_answer.json, and export_result.sh which reads it.
Verified via bash and Python logic in setup_task.sh which creates the /home/ga/DICOM/qa_task directory and saves 5 synthetic DICOM slice files into it.

privileged_info_summary: The task data is synthetically generated via Python using numpy and pydicom in setup_task.sh. It creates 5 CT DICOM slices saved in the verified qa_task_dir (/home/ga/DICOM/qa_task). One slice is randomly corrupted with a mismatched Patient ID (ERR_XXXXX) and StudyInstanceUID, and this ground truth is written to the verified ground_truth_path (/var/lib/app/ground_truth/qa_answer.json). The agent's report is verified to be exported exactly at the verified export_file_path (/home/ga/DICOM/exports/mismatch_report.txt).
